shows.title: Louisville Loves It Loud

icon.alt: Louisville Loves It Loud concert — rock and metal show in Louisville, KY

shows.description: Louisville Loves It Loud features live bands celebrating hard music heavyweights from across the decades — from Korn, Limp Bizkit, and Deftones to Beartooth, I Prevail, and Bring Me The Horizon. Get ready for big riffs, bigger breakdowns, and badass vocal performances while you bang your head.

shows.title: Louisville Loves Grunge

icon.alt: Louisville Loves Grunge concert — 90s alternative rock show in Louisville, KY

shows.description: Louisville Loves Grunge brings the Seattle sound back to life. Flannel and frustration will be on full display as live bands recreate the big hits of Nirvana, Pearl Jam, Soundgarden, Alice in Chains, and more. Slackers welcome.

shows.title: Louisville Loves Louder Than Life

icon.alt: Louisville Loves Louder Than Life pre-party concert in Louisville, KY

shows.description: Louisville Loves Louder Than Life takes the live band celebration of heavy music to 4th St. Live for the official kick-off of America's largest rock & metal festival. Hear the hits of festival favorites past and present as you get ready for the loudest weekend of your life.

shows.title: Louisville Loves Bourbon & Beyond

icon.alt: Louisville Loves Bourbon and Beyond pre-party concert in Louisville, KY

shows.description: Louisville Loves Bourbon & Beyond begins the world's largest bourbon, food & music festival in style, putting live music in the middle of downtown Louisville. Join the fun inside 4th St. Live and sing along to your favorite songs from festival performers past and present.

shows.title: Louisville Loves Emo

icon.alt: Louisville Loves Emo concert — emo and pop punk show in Louisville, KY

shows.description: Louisville Loves Emo celebrates its eighth year of bringing together fans of emo past and present with another big, sad sing-along. Belt all the words to your favorite anthems with live bands and a cast of rotating vocalists celebrating the music of My Chemical Romance, Fall Out Boy, Paramore, and more.

pastShows.title: Louisville Loves Emo
pastShows.description: The show that started it all. Louisville Loves Emo has packed Headliners Music Hall with thousands of fans singing along to emo, pop-punk, and post-hardcore anthems. Songs by My Chemical Romance, Paramore, Fall Out Boy, Brand New, Taking Back Sunday, and dozens more.

pastShows.title: Louisville Loves Nu-Metal
pastShows.description: Headbanging, mosh pits, and pure aggression. Louisville Loves Nu-Metal brings the heaviest hits of Korn, Limp Bizkit, Deftones, System of a Down, Slipknot, Linkin Park, and more to the stage with a rotating lineup of vocalists and a full band.

pastShows.title: Louisville Loves Louder Than Life
pastShows.description: The official Louder Than Life festival pre-party, bringing the energy of the world's largest rock festival to an intimate stage in downtown Louisville.

pastShows.title: Louisville Loves Bourbon & Beyond
pastShows.description: The official Bourbon & Beyond pre-party, blending live music with Louisville's bourbon culture at Fourth Street Live! in the heart of downtown.

series.name: Louisville Loves 2026 Concert Series
series.description: Five genre-themed live concert events in Louisville, Kentucky featuring full bands performing emo, nu-metal, grunge, rock, and country hits. Presented by LLP Events at Headliners Music Hall and Fourth Street Live!
